hyperedges.label: Fog of War Rendering Pipeline
hyperedges.description: HexGeometry produces HexCellSet → VisitedCells protocol bridges to MapFogOfWar → FogResolutionPolicy selects zoom-adaptive H3 resolution → FogGeoJSONBuilder builds inverted MultiPolygon → MapLibre MLNShapeSource renders fog

hyperedges.label: Trip Recording Orchestration
hyperedges.description: TripRecorder is the sole orchestrator connecting LocationRecording (GPS stream), LocationFiltering (AccuracyGate + Kalman), LocationAnalysis (MetricsAccumulator), LocationMotion (auto-pause signals), and HexGeometry (hex cell insertion)

hyperedges.label: Dual Storage Strategy
hyperedges.description: Trip metadata (SwiftData+CloudKit) and raw GPS points / hex snapshots (GRDB via PersistenceCore) are managed behind TripRepository protocol — dual storage hidden from consumers

properties.goal: Xcode workspace skeleton, CI, DesignSystem, PersistenceCore, privacy manifests
Validate fog-of-war as retention mechanic via TestFlight + social media
App Store-ready offline bike tracker with fog-of-war + StoreKit 2 paywall
CloudKit social layer: sync, friends, collaborative fog
Supabase+PostGIS migration, global heatmap, live friend tracking
ML route recommendations + POI layer, Maximum Fog Unlock planner
Standalone Apple Watch app, BLE sensors, Garmin/Wahoo integrations

properties.note: Phase 4 and 5 can run in parallel after Phase 3
MLNOfflinePack with PMTiles is broken; direct URLSession download workaround
Pure functions: AccuracyGate, KalmanFilter1D, Douglas-Peucker LineSimplify
HKWorkoutSession wrapper; gotcha FB18603581 route insertion fix
GPX reader/writer, FIT writer. No external deps.
WAL, migrations, observation helpers, @_exported import GRDB
Liquid Glass tokens, 20+ components, dark-first, SF Pro + SF Mono

properties.storage_strategy: SwiftData+CloudKit for metadata, GRDB for raw GPS and hex snapshots

properties.note: TripRecorder is the only place that connects packages together

properties.rule_violated: Rule 1 — packages operate on primitives only

properties.reason: @Query materializes full dataset; 10k+ GPS points cause OOM
properties.correct: GRDB observation via async stream in ViewModel

properties.rule_violated: Rule 2 — Domain must not know about UI

properties.trigger: push to main + PR to main

properties.method: cellSet(in bbox: MapBBox, atZoom zoom: Double) -> HexCellSet

properties.note: Own struct instead of CLLocation because CLLocation is not Sendable
Only place that connects all packages

properties.kind: SwiftUI custom overlay, not TabView wrapper

properties.reason: Offline maps via PMTiles + style flexibility

nodes.label: Rationale: GRDB for raw GPS, not SwiftData

properties.reason: Offline performance + migration control; @Query OOM risk at 10k+ points
properties.decision: Dual storage: SwiftData+CloudKit for metadata, GRDB for raw points

nodes.norm_label: rationale: grdb for raw gps, not swiftdata

nodes.label: Rationale: GitHub Actions over Xcode Cloud

properties.reason: Xcode Cloud unavailable for current Apple Developer account; GitHub Actions has native integration
properties.decision: GitHub Actions as sole CI provider

nodes.norm_label: rationale: github actions over xcode cloud

properties.reason: Independent compilation, fast tests, lightweight previews, reusability across future apps

nodes.label: Rationale: CloudKit in Phase 2 (not own backend)

properties.reason: Zero server costs; later migrated to Supabase when revenue justifies
properties.decision: CloudKit private+shared database for social features in Phase 2

nodes.norm_label: rationale: cloudkit in phase 2 (not own backend)

properties.reason: PostGIS built-in, RLS, realtime subscriptions; required for global heatmap and live tracking

nodes.label: Rationale: HexKit split into HexCore + HexGeometry

properties.reason: HexCore is stable (changes only on H3 upgrade). HexGeometry evolves with fog mechanic. Different change rhythms.

nodes.norm_label: rationale: hexkit split into hexcore + hexgeometry

properties.reason: LocationFiltering is pure functions testable without simulator; LocationAnalysis used by both live recorder and TripDetail; LocationMotion has own CoreMotion permissions
Project-wide strict Swift 6 concurrency; simplifies UI binding
properties.decision: Set at project level in SCRUM-15

properties.reason: MapOfflineRegions device-only tests; MapFogOfWar needs H3, MapOverlays does not; independent evolution

properties.description: H3 hexagonal grid fog revealed as user cycles through areas; inverted MultiPolygon GeoJSON rendering
Group of friends reveals shared fog in real-time via CloudKit shared database during bikepacking trips
properties.note: Differentiator absent in Strava, Komoot, Fog of World

properties.risk: App Store Review rejection risk; Plan B prepared

properties.description: ML route planner maximizing new hex cells unlocked
properties.note: Transforms fog from passive visualization to active gameplay

properties.reason: Managed backend with PostGIS, RLS, realtime subscriptions

properties.approach: Knowledge Base B — thematic notes with wiki-links

properties.description: World frame as exterior ring; visited hex boundaries as holes; re-fog patches for inner holes in visited polygons
Zoom-aware lossy compaction: z>=13→r9, z11-12→r8, z9-10→r7, z<=8→r6
Dual write during transition period to ensure data consistency
